name: StudioLens
summary: Deep Copilot Studio agent evaluation — quality, topics, transcripts, errors, feedback, and credits.
overviewDescription: Purpose-built for Copilot Studio. StudioLens goes deep on agent evaluation — how your custom agents are used, how they perform, and where they need attention.

detail.heroIntro: Deep agent performance and evaluation for Copilot Studio. StudioLens reads your agents' conversation transcripts and turns them into answers: how agents perform, resolve, contain, and cost — quality, topics, errors, feedback, and message-credit consumption, in one Power BI template.
detail.whatItShows: Agent sessions, turns, errors, and sub-agent calls; quality and performance evaluation including resolution, containment, abandonment, and escalation; topic analysis showing what users actually ask and where conversations succeed or break down; knowledge-file usage; user feedback; and Copilot Studio message-credit consumption for the cost side of the story.
detail.whatsInside: Two builds of the same template. Dataverse (Direct) parses transcripts live in the Power BI model — open the template, set the two required inputs, done; nothing else to stand up. The Fabric build lands transcripts and credit consumption as Delta tables in a Lakehouse for scheduled ingestion, larger volumes, longer history, and the PPAC message-credit pages.
detail.dataRequirements: A Dataverse environment where Copilot Studio logs conversation transcripts, plus an org-data CSV. The Fabric path additionally needs Fabric capacity and a Lakehouse. Note Dataverse's ~30-day transcript retention — the Fabric path is the answer for historical analysis at scale.

tiers.name: Fabric
tiers.description: Scheduled ingestion for scale and history.

detail.disclaimer: Experimental template reading Copilot Studio transcripts from Dataverse. Not an official Microsoft-supported product — questions and issues via the GitHub repo.
detail.whatItShowsLead: StudioLens reads your agents' conversation transcripts and turns them into answers.
